title: vangueriopsis calycophila
intro: Vangueriopsis calycophila is a plant species in the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the African medinilla. The medicinal properties of Vangueriopsis calycophila have been found to have antimalarial, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant has been reported to have several health benefits, including the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory infections, as well as the reduction of inflammation and pain. Herbal preparations of Vangueriopsis calycophila can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine in Africa.
